data.name: Err_ImportProjects_NoPdfPath
data.value: Cannot import a project without a source PDF path.

data.name: Err_ImportProjects_DifferentPdf
data.value: Selected projects use different source PDFs. Import is only possible for one source document.

data.name: Dialog_Layers_ExportVisibleOnly
data.value: Export and print only visible layers

data.name: Dialog_Layers_DeleteNonEmpty
data.value: The layer "{0}" contains {1} objects. What do you want to do with them?

data.name: Dialog_Layers_DeleteConfirmEmpty
data.value: Do you want to delete the layer "{0}"?

data.name: Vector_Shape_DefaultTooltip
data.value: Click on the page to start drawing.

data.name: Vector_Shape_Tooltip_Polyline
data.value: Polyline: Left mouse button adds nodes. Double-click or right mouse button finishes.

data.name: Vector_Shape_Tooltip_Region
data.value: Region: Left mouse button adds points. Double-click or right mouse button closes.

data.name: Vector_Shape_Tooltip_Rectangle
data.value: Rectangle: Set two corners. ALT enforces a square.

data.name: Vector_Shape_Tooltip_Ellipse
data.value: Ellipse: Set start and end of bounds. ALT enforces a circle.

data.name: Vector_Shape_Tooltip_Triangle
data.value: Triangle: Set start and end of bounds. ALT enforces an equilateral triangle.

data.name: Vector_Shape_Tooltip_Arc
data.value: Arc: Set start, end, and a third arc point.

data.name: Msg_LegalBasesDictionary_NotImplemented
data.value: Legal bases dictionary will be available in the next phase.

data.name: Menu_IgnorePdfRestrictions_Tooltip
data.value: Allows processing PDFs with owner-imposed editing restrictions.

data.name: Delete_Err_StartGreater
data.value: The start page cannot be greater than the end page.

data.name: Delete_Err_NoData
data.value: Provide at least one page number or a split step!

data.name: Split_Err_SelectFile
data.value: Please select an existing PDF file.

data.name: Tooltip_LoadPdf
data.value: Open a PDF file for anonymization. CTRL + N.

data.name: Tooltip_SetPassword
data.value: When checked — the PDF will be protected with a password.

data.name: Tooltip_SafeMode
data.value: Enables graphic page mode instead of text mode.

data.name: Msg_PageMarkedForDeletion_EditLocked
data.value: PAGE MARKED FOR DELETION EDITING IS LOCKED

data.name: Tooltip_RemovePage
data.value: Mark current page for deletion. DELETE.

data.name: Tooltip_RemovePageRange
data.value: Select a page range to delete or to cancel deletion.

data.name: Tooltip_Signatures_Report
data.value: Create a signatures report on an extra page.

data.name: Tooltip_Signatures_Original
data.value: Anonymize signatures and keep their original visual appearance.

data.name: Tooltip_PageNumber
data.value: Enter a page number and press Enter.

data.name: Tooltip_ZoomMin
data.value: Zoom out to minimum. CTRL + wheel down.

data.name: Tooltip_ZoomMax
data.value: Zoom in to maximum. CTRL + wheel up.

data.name: Tooltip_SearchToSelection
data.value: Mark search results for redaction. Click again to remove marks.

data.name: Tooltip_PersonalData
data.value: Search for identifiers (PESEL, land register no., etc.).

data.name: Tooltip_SaveProject
data.value: Save project with marks under previous name. CTRL + S.

data.name: Tooltip_SaveProjectAs
data.value: Save project with marks under a chosen name.

data.name: Tooltip_OpenProject
data.value: Open a project with marks for anonymization. CTRL + O.

data.name: Tooltip_HighlightColor
data.value: Selections will be blacked out in the saved PDF file.

data.name: Tooltip_ShowOutline
data.value: Draw a thin outline for redaction areas in the saved file.

data.name: Tooltip_Marker
data.value: Marker: select a line of text. CTRL: select with a rectangle.

data.name: Tooltip_Box
data.value: Box: select a text area with a rectangle.

data.name: Tooltip_ClearAll
data.value: Remove all selections from the document.

data.name: Tooltip_SavePdf
data.value: Save anonymized PDF under a chosen name. CTRL + SHIFT + S.

data.name: Tooltip_PagesList
data.value: Click an item to display the page.

data.name: Tooltip_PageThumbnails
data.value: Click a thumbnail to display the page.

data.name: Tooltip_LayersView
data.value: Click a layer icon to change its visibility, lock state, or active state.

data.name: Err_AllPagesMarked
data.value: Cannot save — all pages are marked for deletion.

data.name: Tutorial_NoItems
data.value: Tutorial does not contain any topics.

data.name: License_StartupError
License_RevokedDefault
data.value: The license has been revoked. The application switches to DEMO mode.

data.name: Msg_HelpNotFound
data.value: Help PDF was not found in the application folder.

data.name: Msg_OpenPdfError
data.value: There was a problem opening the PDF file: {0}

data.name: Msg_FileOpenError
data.value: There was a problem opening the file: {0}

data.name: Msg_LicenseNotFound
data.value: License file "LICENSE" was not found in the application folder.

data.name: Msg_NoticesNotFound
data.value: Third-party notices file "THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md" was not found in the application folder.

data.name: Msg_ServiceUpdateInProgress
data.value: A maintenance update for {1} is in progress until {0}.

data.name: Msg_ExportGraphics_Done
Msg_NewVersionDetectedMaintenance
data.value:
A newer version of {1} was detected. Maintenance will run until {0}.
Please save your work and close the application.
The application will close automatically in 5 minutes.

data.name: Msg_MaintenanceRecoveryPrompt
data.value: The application was closed for maintenance. Do you want to restore the last session?

data.name: Msg_NewVersionAvailable
data.value: A newer version {0} is available for download (updated: {1}).

data.name: Msg_UpdateLicenseOutOfRange
data.value:
This version is newer than your support entitlement. A license for newer versions was not purchased.
The application switches to DEMO mode.

data.name: Err_InvalidPdfFile
data.value:
This PDF file is invalid.
Check if you can open it in another application.

data.name: Err_InvalidProjectFormat
data.value:
This project format is invalid.
Contact the application author.

data.name: Err_TooFewPages
data.value: Too few pages in the document!

data.name: Msg_NoIdentifiersFound
data.value: No valid PESEL, land-register numbers or other identifiers were found in the document.

data.name: Msg_NoSearchResultsOnPage
data.value: No search results found on the current page.

data.name: Msg_NoSelectionsOnPage
data.value: No selections on the current page.

data.name: Msg_TextsCopiedToClipboard
data.value: Texts from selections have been copied to the clipboard.

data.name: Msg_NoTextFromSelections
data.value: Could not retrieve text from any selection.

data.name: Msg_RasterImageAdded
data.value: Raster object added to the current page.

data.name: Msg_NoRasterImageInClipboard
data.value: The clipboard does not contain a raster image.

data.name: Msg_PasteVectorGraphic_NotImplemented
data.value: Pasting vector graphics from the clipboard will be available in the next stage.

data.name: Msg_Layers_NotImplemented
data.value: Layer management will be available in the next stage.

data.name: Msg_PasteGraphic_NotImplemented
data.value: Pasting graphics from the clipboard (raster and vector) will be available in the next stage.

data.name: Msg_ClipboardUnavailable
data.value: The clipboard is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.

data.name: Msg_NameSearchServiceUnavailable
data.value: The service for searching names is currently unavailable.

data.name: Err_OutputInUse
data.value: Cannot save the PDF file. The output file is currently in use.

data.name: Err_CannotAnonymizePdf
data.value: This PDF file cannot be anonymized!

data.name: Msg_PreviewSavedPdf
data.value: Check the saved PDF document in the preview.

data.name: Msg_Confirm_OpenNewWithUnsavedSelections
data.value:
Are you sure you want to open a new PDF?
You have defined, unsaved selections in the document...

data.name: Msg_Confirm_CloseWithUnsavedSelections
data.value:
Are you sure you want to close the document?
You have defined, unsaved selections in the document...

data.name: Msg_Confirm_DeleteTextAnnotation
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this text?

data.name: Msg_Confirm_DeleteRasterObject
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this graphic object?

data.name: Msg_Confirm_DeleteMultipleObjects
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete selected objects?

data.name: Msg_Confirm_ClearAllSelections
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove all selections from the document?

data.name: Msg_Confirm_ClearPageSelections
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove all selections from the current page?

data.name: Msg_Confirm_DiscardUnsavedRedactions
data.value:
You have unsaved redaction changes in the document.
Are you sure you want to discard them?

data.name: Msg_DragDrop_UnsupportedFileType
data.value: Unsupported file type. Drag a PDF or .app file.

data.name: Err_LoadRecentFiles
data.value: An error occurred while loading recent files: {0}

data.name: Msg_Confirm_NameSearchSlow
data.value:
Note: searching for names may take a long time
and may not return correct results.
Do you want to continue?

data.name: Err_UnhandledException
Msg_ProjectSaved
data.value: The current project state has been saved under the selected name.

data.name: Msg_Closing_UnsavedSelectionsPrefix
data.value: You have unsaved changes in the project

data.name: Msg_Confirm_CloseApp
data.value: Are you sure you want to close the application?

data.name: PwdPrompt_Title_CanChangeRemove
data.value: You can change or remove the PDF password

data.name: Dialog_Title_SavePdfAs
data.value: Save the PDF under a different name

data.name: Dialog_Title_SavePap
data.value: Enter a project file name for {0}

data.name: About_Message
About_Copyright
data.value: Copyright © 2025–2026 Urząd Miasta Szczecin; Modifications © 2026–2027 Sławomir Klimek

data.name: Signatures_Report_Title
data.value: List of qualified signatures in the original document (before anonymization):

data.name: Msg_UpdateCheckInProgress
data.value: Update check is already in progress.

data.name: Msg_UpdateAlreadyLatest
data.value: You are already using the latest version.

data.name: Msg_StandaloneUpdate_AskDownloadAndRun
data.value: Do you want to download and run the installer now?

data.name: Err_StandaloneUpdate_InvalidInstallerLink
data.value: No valid installer link found in version.json (downloadUrl).

data.name: Msg_StandaloneUpdate_DownloadInProgress
data.value: Update installer download is already in progress. Please wait.

data.name: Msg_StandaloneUpdate_Downloading
data.value:
Downloading update installer. Please wait.
You will be notified when the download is complete.

data.name: Err_StandaloneUpdate_DownloadOrRunFailed
data.value: Failed to download or start update: {0}

data.name: Msg_StandaloneUpdate_InstallerReadyAskClose
data.value:
The update installer has been downloaded.
Close the application and run the installer now?

data.name: Msg_LicenseActivation_StandaloneOnly
data.value: License activation from file is available only in single-workstation mode.

data.name: Err_LicensePackage_NotFound
data.value: Selected license package was not found.

data.name: Err_LicensePackage_MissingRequiredFile
data.value: Required file is missing in package: {0}

data.name: Err_LicensePackage_InvalidLicense
data.value: Package does not contain a valid AnonPDFPro license.

data.name: Err_BitmapsDifferentDimensions
data.value: Both bitmaps must have the same dimensions.

data.name: Msg_PageMarkedForDeletion_UnmarkToEdit
data.value: This page is marked for deletion. Unmark it first to edit this page.

data.name: Err_StandaloneUpdate_MsiexecNoProcess
data.value: Installer start returned no process instance.

data.name: Err_Codec_TiffMissing
data.value: TIFF codec was not found on this system.

data.name: Err_Codec_JpegMissing
data.value: JPEG codec was not found on this system.

data.name: Err_PageNumberOutOfRange
data.value: Page number must be between 1 and {0}.

data.name: Err_Split_FileHasSecurity
data.value: Cannot split file [{0}] because it has security settings.

data.name: Err_Merge_FilesHaveSecurity
data.value: Cannot merge files, the following files have security settings:

data.name: Pdf_Metadata_iTextCopyright
data.value: This document was created or modified using iText Core / Community. Copyright (c) iText Group NV.

data.name: Tooltip_SearchInput
data.value: Enter text to search and press Enter.

data.name: Footnotes_MissingLegalBasisDescription
data.value: No legal basis description available for footnote [{0}].

data.name: Footnotes_ExclusionAuthority_Label
data.value: Enter authority or person performing exclusions:

data.name: Footnotes_ExclusionAuthority_Required
data.value: This field is required for selected legal bases.

data.name: Footnotes_LegalBases_Saved
data.value: Legal bases dictionary has been saved.

data.name: Footnotes_LegalBases_LoadGlobalError
data.value: Cannot load global legal bases dictionary.

data.name: Footnotes_LegalBases_LoadLocalError
data.value: Cannot load user legal bases dictionary.

data.name: Footnotes_LegalBases_SaveGlobalError
data.value: Cannot save global legal bases dictionary.

data.name: Footnotes_LegalBases_SaveLocalError
data.value: Cannot save user legal bases dictionary.

data.name: Footnotes_LegalBases_InvalidEntry
data.value: Legal bases list contains invalid entries.

data.name: Footnotes_LegalBases_DuplicateTitle
data.value: Duplicate legal basis short title detected: {0}.

data.name: Footnotes_LegalBases_NoWriteAccess
data.value: No write permission for legal bases dictionary.

data.name: Footnotes_Scopes_LoadGlobalError
data.value: Cannot load global exclusion scopes dictionary.

data.name: Footnotes_Scopes_LoadLocalError
data.value: Cannot load user exclusion scopes dictionary.

data.name: Footnotes_Scopes_SaveGlobalError
data.value: Cannot save global exclusion scopes dictionary.

data.name: Footnotes_Scopes_SaveLocalError
data.value: Cannot save user exclusion scopes dictionary.

data.name: Footnotes_Scopes_InvalidEntry
data.value: Exclusion scopes list contains invalid entries.

data.name: Msg_Print_JobSubmitted
data.value: Document was sent to the printer.

data.name: QuickStart_Step1_Line1
data.value: Marker is used to select a line of text.

data.name: QuickStart_Step1_Line2
data.value: Box is used to select a rectangular area.

data.name: QuickStart_Step2_Line1
data.value: To select, press the left mouse button, drag, and release.

data.name: QuickStart_Step2_Line2
data.value: You can remove selections with the right mouse button on a selection, or with "Clear page" and "Clear all".

data.name: QuickStart_Step3_Line1
data.value: Click "Save PDF" to create a new file without exposed data.
